messages.text: Hey! Do you guys have the Arctic Parka in Sage Green back in stock soon?

Hi there! 👋 We're expecting a restock of the Arctic Parka in Sage Green by the first week of November. You can sign up for notifications on the product page here: https://fjordapparel.com/products/arctic-parka-sage
My order #88291 arrived but the zipper is stuck. Can I get a refund?
I'm so sorry to hear about the zipper issue! 🌲 I've escalated this to our support team right away. Someone will reach out via email within the hour to handle your refund or replacement.
I'm 5'11" and 180lbs, should I go Medium or Large for the Base Layer top?

Great question! For your height and weight, we usually recommend a Large for a comfortable fit, or a Medium if you prefer it very snug against the skin. Check out our size guide for specific measurements: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/size-chart
Just wanted to say I wore the Summit Shell on my hike up Rainier and it kept me bone dry. Best gear I've owned.
That is what we love to hear! 🏔️ Massive congrats on the Rainier summit. Thanks for taking us along for the adventure!
I need to change my shipping address for order #99021. It's urgent!!
I'll get a human to help with this immediately! I've flagged your order #99021 to our shipping team to catch it before it leaves the warehouse.
Do you offer international shipping to Norway?
We sure do! 🌍 We ship to Norway and most of Europe. Shipping rates are calculated at checkout. You can find more details here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/shipping
Is the Merino wool ethically sourced?

Absolutely. All our Merino wool is ZQ-certified, ensuring the highest standards of animal welfare, environmental sustainability, and social responsibility. 🐑 Learn more about our materials here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/sustainability
I want to place a bulk order for my mountain rescue team. It's about $1,200 worth of gear. Do you offer discounts?
First off, thank you for the incredible work you do. 🏔️ I'm escalating your request to our Pro Sales manager who handles group orders and high-value inquiries. They will be in touch shortly!
Are the Daypack straps adjustable for shorter torsos?

Yes, they are! The Daypack features fully adjustable shoulder and sternum straps to fit a wide range of body types. Here's a quick video showing the fit: https://fjordapparel.com/products/daypack#video
The color in the photo looks more blue than the one I received. It looks teal in person.
I'm sorry the color wasn't what you expected! Lighting can sometimes be tricky. I've sent this to our support team so they can help you with a free return or exchange for a color you'll love. 🌲
